message:
feat(arrayapi,conformance,special): implement CoreArrayBackend, special-function conformance harness, and extended unit tests

fsci-arrayapi:
- Add `ArrayApiArray` trait with shape/dtype/ndim/size accessors, constrain
  `ArrayApiBackend::Array` to implement it
- Add default-erroring `array_from_slice`, `reshape`, and `transpose` methods
  to the `ArrayApiBackend` trait for backends to override
- Implement `CoreArray` concrete type with nalgebra DMatrix/DVector conversion
  helpers (`from_dmatrix`, `to_dmatrix`, `from_dvector`, `to_dvector`)
- Implement full `CoreArrayBackend` backed by `Vec<ScalarValue>` storage:
  asarray, zeros, ones, empty, full, arange, linspace, getitem (basic slice +
  advanced + boolean mask), broadcast_to, astype, result_type, array_from_slice,
  reshape, transpose — all with dtype-dispatch logging and shape-mismatch
  recording via `DTypeDispatchLog` / `ShapeMismatchLog`
- Add helper infrastructure: `scalar_to_f64`, `cast_scalar_to_dtype`,
  `normalize_single_index`, `basic_slice_indices`, `unravel_index`,
  `basic_getitem`, `advanced_getitem`, `dtype_rank`, `filled_values`
- Wire `from_slice`, `reshape`, `transpose` into creation/indexing modules and
  re-export from crate root
- Add nalgebra 0.33.2 dependency; add proptest/serde/serde_json dev-deps

fsci-conformance:
- Add `fsci-special` workspace dependency
- Define `SpecialCaseFunction` enum (17 scalar functions + 6 relational/
  metamorphic identities), `SpecialValueClass`, `SpecialExpectedOutcome`
  (scalar with tolerance, class, error kind), `SpecialCase`, and
  `SpecialPacketFixture` serde models
- Implement `run_differential_special` harness that dispatches every special
  case through `execute_special_case` -> fsci-special public API, compares
  results via `compare_special_case_differential` with contract-table-aware
  tolerance resolution (`load_special_contract_table`,
  `resolve_special_contract_tolerance`)
- Metamorphic relational cases: erf+erfc identity, gamma recurrence,
  beta symmetry, gammainc complement, Jn three-term recurrence, erfinv
  round-trip composition
- Register "special" family branch in `run_differential_test` dispatcher
- Add FSCI-P2C-006_special_core.json fixture (29+ cases spanning differential,
  metamorphic, and adversarial categories)
- Add tests: `differential_test_special_fixture` (zero-failure gate),
  `differential_special_quota_and_structured_logs` (category quotas >=15/6/8,
  structured JSON log emission + artifact persistence)

fsci-special:
- Add `unit_vector_broadcast_and_shape_edge_cases` test covering erf/erfc
  vector identity, beta vector+scalar broadcast, mismatched-vector domain
  error in hardened mode, and j0 vector output
- Add `unit_domain_boundary_matrix_strict_vs_hardened` test covering erfinv
  boundary infinities, erfcinv boundary infinities, jn non-integer order
  (strict NaN vs hardened DomainError), gammaincc invalid shape parameter
- Add `property_erfcinv_erfc_roundtrip_grid` (120-point grid, 4e-6 tolerance)
- Add `property_bessel_envelope_large_x_grid` (200-point grid verifying
  J0^2+Y0^2 ~ 2/(pi*x) asymptotic envelope)
- Add `property_jn_three_term_recurrence_grid` (960-point n=1..8 grid
  verifying J_{n+1} = (2n/x)*J_n - J_{n-1})

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
